member.name: T:DGLabFramework.My.Resources.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:DGLabFramework.My.Resources.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:DGLabFramework.My.Resources.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:DGLabFramework.DGServer.Port
member.summary: 获取或设置服务端的端口号

member.name: P:DGLabFramework.DGServer.Address
member.summary: 获取或设置服务端的地址

member.name: P:DGLabFramework.DGServer.ID
member.summary: 获取或设置服务端的ID，格式为XXXX-XXXXXXXXX-XXXXX-XXXXX-XX

member.name: F:DGLabFramework.DGServer.Devices
member.summary: 包含当前连接的设备ID列表，每个设备ID格式为XXXX-XXXXXXXXX-XXXXX-XXXXX-XX

member.name: F:DGLabFramework.DGServer.DeviceN
member.summary: 预留给下一个设备的编号

member.name: M:DGLabFramework.DGServer.SendWave(DGLabFramework.DGServer.Channel,DGLabFramework.Wave,System.Int32)
member.summary: 将波形发送到郊狼设备

member.name: M:DGLabFramework.DGServer.GetQRCode
member.summary: 获取郊狼服务端的二维码

member.name: P:DGLabFramework.Pulse.Frequency
member.summary: 获取或设置脉冲频率，范围1~100

member.name: P:DGLabFramework.Pulse.Voltage
member.summary: 获取或设置脉冲电压，范围0~100

member.name: F:DGLabFramework.Wave.Pulses
member.summary: 包含的脉冲，长度不可超过400。

member.name: M:DGLabFramework.Wave.ToString
member.summary: 将波形转换为郊狼控制命令
